calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Daniel Piccinini, Esq. for Plaintiff: Robert Imhoff, also present.
Eric Lifschitz, Esq. for Defendant, Janice Strong, also present.
11:25 A.M. Parties have settled, terms were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to return possession of the property located at 1290 Grove #405 and Garage #7, San Francisco, with keys of the unit to Mr. Piccinini on or before 5 P.M. Apr. 27, 2006.
Upon surrendered of the premises in good condition, Plaintiff will pay Defendant the sum of $5,000.00 for P.I. sustained by the Defendant, without the finding of any wrong doing.
Securtiy Deposit forfeited, leasing and parking agreement is void.
Parties mutually released each other from all claims, each to bear own costs anf fees.
Any property left is deemed abandoned and to be disposed off.
If Defendant fails to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled for a Judgment against Defendant upon 48 hrs notice to counsel, for an Ex Parte Application with declaration for Judgment.
If vacated as agreed, Plaintiff to Dismissed with prejudice.
Each party waived claim against the other.
Terms of settlement will be reduced to writting by Mr. Piccinini.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled, trial date vacated.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL PICCININI FOR PLAINTIFF ROBERT A. IMHOFF
ERIC LIFSCHITZ FOR DEFENDANT JANICE STRONG

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS
